name: Configure Account Security Policy
description: Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and update the 'Accounts' security configuration. Set 'Login Expiration in Days' to 90. Configure the 'Password Policy' to require a minimum length of 12 characters (including at least one lowercase, one uppercase, one number, and one symbol), enable 'Forbid Repeating Characters' with a limit of 3, and set 'Password History' to 5. Save all changes.
